title: Landing Page Redesign - Complete
summary: Implementation record of the CardGPT landing page v2.0 redesign: brand palette, floating-cards animation, How It Works section, stats, footer, and PWA setup.
notes: Manifest declared SPEC; accepted as authoritative. Content is a completed-implementation report with concrete design tokens, breakpoints, PWA manifest fields, and performance/accessibility criteria, which is consistent with SPEC-style technical constraints, though its retrospective 'what was built' framing also carries DOC characteristics.
